events.position: entered honorary East India company's service

education: Educated at Stonyhurst College, Lancashire; admitted to practice as an advocate at the St. Lucia bar, 1865; was called to the bar, Middle Temple, 1868

succeeded to the command of the forces

in command at all subsequent operations
removed to the colonelcy of the 39th Foot

education: M.D. Edin., F.R.C.S.E., M.R.C.S. Eng.—Member Royal Medical Society of Edinburgh

education: Educated at Marlborough and Balliol college, Oxford, where he obtained a double second class in moderations, and a second in classics in the final examination 1868
